summary: The diff shows modifications to Header.tsx and documentation files, but does not provide evidence of the actual image file being cropped. The BuildRequest specifies an image edit to crop speakr-logo.png and generate speakr-logo-cropped.dim_800x400.png, which should appear as a new file addition. The Header.tsx references the cropped image path, but without the actual image file change, the core requirement remains unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Crop the speaker logo image file to remove excess white space underneath the graphic
missing_requirements.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly specifies an image edit operation: 'Crop the bottom edge to remove excess white space underneath the speaker graphic (speakr-logo.png > speakr-logo-cropped.dim_800x400.png)'. The diff shows no added image files. While Header.tsx references the cropped image path '/assets/generated/speakr-logo-cropped.dim_800x400.png', the actual cropped image file is not present in the diff as a new or modified file.
evidence: No image files in ADDED FILES or MODIFIED FILES sections
